messages.content: I want you act as medical Chinese-English translator, I will provide you some paragraphs and your task is to accurately and academically translate the paragraphs only into the other language. Do not repeat the original provided paragraphs after translation. You should use artificial intelligence tools, such as natural language processing, and rhetorical knowledge and meidcal experience about effective writing techniques to reply.

Sure, I can help you with medical Chinese-English translation. Please provide me with the paragraphs you would like me to translate, and I will do my best to provide accurate and academic translations using natural language processing and my understanding of effective writing techniques in both languages.
除了4号是门诊病人，其他都接受住院治疗
Except for patient number 4, all others are receiving inpatient treatment at the hospital.
总所周知
As is widely known...
使用高剂量甲氨蝶呤发生不良反应的概率极大，尤其是诱发肝功能损伤
The probability of experiencing adverse reactions is significantly increased when using high-dose methotrexate, especially in terms of hepatotoxicity.
因此，多次及时的检测可帮助医生及时实施解救，减少患者不良反应反生
Therefore, multiple timely tests can help doctors implement rescue measures promptly, reducing the occurrence of adverse reactions in patients.
此外，给药后短时间的监测对于评估骨肉瘤患者的治疗效果具有重要参考价值
In addition, short-term monitoring after medication administration is of significant value in assessing the therapeutic effects in osteosarcoma patients.
结合相关信息
Incorporating relevant information...
结合GFR的相关数据，评估不良反应风险
Based on the associated data of glomerular filtration rate (GFR), the risk of adverse reactions can be assessed.
该设备可允许患者居家进行TDM，节省患者来医院检测的时间，可一定程度缓解医疗资源不平衡的矛盾

This device enables patients to perform therapeutic drug monitoring (TDM) at home, saving them time from visiting the hospital for testing. It can alleviate to some extent the contradiction of imbalanced medical resources.
宏观上看，可一定程度缓解医疗资源不平衡的矛盾
From a macro perspective, it can help to a certain extent in alleviating the contradiction of imbalanced medical resources.
宏观上看，可作为缓解医疗资源不平衡的策略
From a macro perspective, it can be seen as a strategy to alleviate the imbalance of medical resources.

I want you act as an expert in scientific writing, I will provide you some paragraphs in English and your task is to improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, conciseness and overall readability of the text provided, while breaking down long sentences, reducing repletion. Do not repeat the original provided paragraphs after improvement. You should use artificial intelligence tools, such as natural language processing, and rhetorical knowledge and experience about effective writing techniques to reply.

Of course! I can help you with improving the spelling, grammar, clarity, conciseness, and overall readability of your paragraphs. Please provide me with the text you would like me to enhance, and I will utilize artificial intelligence tools, natural language processing, and my knowledge of effective writing techniques to assist you.
As for low dose MTX (LD-MTX), it was is prescribed most in autoimmune disease especially rheumatoid arthritis (RA) that it was is identified as the first-line therapy medicine for it
Low-dose methotrexate (LD-MTX) is commonly prescribed for autoimmune diseases, particularly rheumatoid arthritis (RA), where it is identified as the first-line therapy.

Usually, the amount of MTX in RA was is much lower than that in cancer treatment. The Cmax do not reach the danger concentration normally. But TDM of MTX would help doctors keep in touch with the adherence of RA patients and guide medication undoubtedly.

The dosage of methotrexate (MTX) used in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) treatment is typically much lower than that used in cancer treatment. As a result, the maximum concentration (Cmax) of MTX usually does not reach dangerous levels. However, therapeutic drug monitoring (TDM) of MTX can still be valuable in maintaining communication with RA patients, ensuring adherence to medication, and providing necessary guidance.
羧基的英文
The English term for "羧基" is "carboxyl group".
